bioEn: I'm Nasri, a software engineer based remotely across Indonesia. I started as a Data Engineer, went deep into Blockchain, led R&D teams, and now build full-stack production systems. I don't fit in one box — and I like it that way.
bioId: Saya Nasri, software engineer yang bekerja secara remote. Mulai dari Data Engineer, mendalami Blockchain, memimpin tim R&D, hingga membangun sistem full-stack. Saya tidak bisa dikotakkan — dan saya suka itu.
